zh.Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England,: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clere於1200年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親Nicholas Clere24歲，母親Anabell Ormesby24歲。他於1220年與Katherine Sneke在英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clere于1200年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲Nicholas Clere24岁，母亲Anabell Ormesby24岁。他于1220年与Katherine Sneke在英国英格兰諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clere was born in 1200, in Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Clere, was 24 and his mother, Anabell Ormesby, was 24. He married Katherine Sneke in 1220, in Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

Il a épousé Katherine Sneke en 1220, à Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: William Clereが1200年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクケイストル サイント エドムンズで生まれた時，父Nicholas Clereは24歳，母Anabell Ormesbyは24歳であった。1220年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクケイストル サイント エドムンズでKatherine Snekeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈
ko.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: William Clere(이)가 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Clere(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Anabell Ormesby(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈에서 Katherine Sneke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clere родился в 1200 г. в местности цеистор сеинт эдмундс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Clere было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anabell Ormesby, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Sneke в 1220 г. в местности цеистор сеинт эдмундс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.
